description: A v0.2.0 Class C artifact whose evidence entry carries a real Ed25519 signature, verifying under the declared eligible_attester's pubkey over the canonical body of the evidence entry (signature field excluded), MUST satisfy C5/C6/C7. The keypair is derived from RFC 8032 §7.1 Test-1 seed; the signature is real.

input.claim: this action received the required approvals

action_policy.reason: Consensus reached but execution authorization is separately governed (AG1).

why: SPEC_LOCK_v0.2.0 §2.7: real Ed25519 signature verifies under the declared eligible_attester's pubkey. Exercises C5 (signature verifies), C6 (attester_kid matches eligible_attesters[0].kid), C7 (kid equals SHA-256(pubkey)[:16] base64url). Quorum=1 met by one valid signed attestation → CONSENSUS_VALID. AG1 still holds: action_allowed=false.
